name: WordPress Site
description: Deploy a production-ready WordPress site with MySQL backend and optional ingress configuration.

fields.name: site_name
fields.label: Site Name
fields.helpText: Name for the WordPress site (used in URL and metadata)

fields.name: admin_email
fields.label: Admin Email
fields.helpText: Email address for the WordPress admin account

fields.name: admin_password
fields.label: Admin Password
fields.helpText: Password for the WordPress admin account

fields.name: storage_size
fields.label: Storage Size (Gi)
fields.helpText: Persistent storage size for WordPress content
